title: Swing's Architectural Relationship to AWT
description: A flowchart illustrating how Swing components are built upon and extend the foundational AWT framework, rather than replacing it.
relationships: AWT provides the foundational platform-specific windowing core
Heavyweight AWT components are peers to the native OS
Swing components are lightweight and paint themselves onto a single AWT container
All Swing components inherit from the AWT Container class
Swing uses the AWT event handling and painting mechanism
